properties.Test Case: Reupload with Moderator permission and this time check the box to change the uploader. Upload. Verify the uploader change is reflected on Bloom Library.
properties.Steps: - Reupload with Moderator permission and this time check the box to change the uploader. Upload. Verify the uploader change is reflected on Bloom Library.

properties.Test Case: On Bloom Library (hint: using a different chrome profile), log in with Moderator permissions and assign the newly uploaded book to the bookshelf for which your Collection Editor alias has permissions.
properties.Steps: - On Bloom Library (hint: using a different chrome profile), log in with Moderator permissions and assign the newly uploaded book to the bookshelf for which your Collection Editor alias has permissions.

properties.Test Case: Reupload by user with Collection permission: In Bloom Edit, change the title once again. In Bloom Publish: Web, click to Sign Out. Then Sign In with Collection Editor alias account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the collision dialog should look something like this. Ensure the uploader avatar matches the correct uploader which is different from the avatar beside "you have permission". Under the "yes" option is a tick box to change the uploader. Do not tick that box. Choose "Yes" and then the UPLOAD button. Verify the uploaded book has the new title and has retained the original uploader.
properties.Steps: - Reupload by user with Collection permission: In Bloom Edit, change the title once again. In Bloom Publish: Web, click to Sign Out. Then Sign In with Collection Editor alias account. After clicking the Upload Book button, the collision dialog should look something like this. Ensure the uploader avatar matches the correct uploader which is different from the avatar beside "you have permission". Under the "yes" option is a tick box to change the uploader. Do not tick that box. Choose "Yes" and then the UPLOAD button. Verify the uploaded book has the new title and has retained the original uploader.

properties.Test Case: Reupload with Collection Editor permission and this time check the box to change the uploader. Upload. Verify the change in uploader is reflected on Bloom Library.
properties.Steps: - Reupload with Collection Editor permission and this time check the box to change the uploader. Upload. Verify the change in uploader is reflected on Bloom Library.

properties.Test Case: Bulk Upload Quick Test - Copy "Bulk Upload Quick Test" folder from Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Bulk Upload Quick Test into Document/Bloom and open it - update the Bloom Subscription to a newer valid one if necessary; make Bloom Library Bookshelf to be none; delete any of the books if they are still there from the last test pass - Choose any book, Publish to Web, choose Upload this collection --> warning about needing to set the bookshelf - set bookshelf and return to upload collection - confirm results of 4 new books uploaded. - On Blorg, confirm each according to the screenshots included in the front covers - Without changing anything, republish collection: -> 4 books skipped - Change one book, republish --> 1 book updated, 3 books skipped
properties.Steps:
Bulk Upload Quick Test
- Copy "Bulk Upload Quick Test" folder from Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Bulk Upload Quick Test into Document/Bloom and open it
- update the Bloom Subscription to a newer valid one if necessary; make Bloom Library Bookshelf to be none; delete any of the books if they are still there from the last test pass
- Choose any book, Publish to Web, choose Upload this collection --> warning about needing to set the bookshelf
- set bookshelf and return to upload collection
- confirm results of 4 new books uploaded.
- On Blorg, confirm each according to the screenshots included in the front covers
- Without changing anything, republish collection: -> 4 books skipped
- Change one book, republish --> 1 book updated, 3 books skipped
